subject: Register SinisterSnapVersionPoll Windows scheduled task (Phase 0 of snap-auto-update pipeline)
purpose: Auto-detect Snap version drift so the fleet can refresh hooks + APK before lineage-cluster bans cascade. Composes with Phase 0 of snap-auto-update design.md. Task runs the EXISTING tools/snap-update-detector/poll.ps1 — no new .ps1 (NO-BAT-NO-PS1 doctrine).

scheduled_task_spec.name: SinisterSnapVersionPoll
scheduled_task_spec.trigger: every 6 hours, on logon, no time limit
scheduled_task_spec.principal: current user (LIMITED token; poll.ps1 only reads APKMirror + Play Store + writes _shared-memory/state/)

on_version_change_hook_required: poll.ps1 must emit a high-priority fleet-update row on detected version delta via automations/fleet-update.ps1. Verify poll.ps1 actually does this; if not, sanctum agent adds the emit. Format: priority=high, kind=snap-version-delta, body={"prev":"<v>","now":"<v>","detected_at_utc":"..."}.
cross_compatibility_note: Per 2026-05-25 NO-BAT-NO-PS1 doctrine, NEW scripts must be Python. poll.ps1 already exists as 289 LOC legacy file (pre-doctrine, shipped 2026-05-24T20:18Z); per doctrine 'Existing ~250 .ps1 files in automations/ = legacy; left in place; migrate to Python on next non-trivial touch'. So this task wires the EXISTING .ps1. On the next non-trivial poll.ps1 edit, migrate to poll.py.
not_in_scope: Registering on Leo machines (cross-machine concern; separate sinister-link doctrine)
Phase 1/3/5 wiring (kernel-apk owns those; shipped this turn)
